title: Nesting Navigators and Lifecycle
description: Combine navigators and understand screen focus events.

slides.title: Combining Navigators 🧩
Navigation Lifecycle ⏱️
useIsFocused Example

quizData.question: Which hook runs an effect when the screen comes into focus?
quizData.explanation: `useFocusEffect` from React Navigation runs when the screen is focused and cleans up on blur.

slides.title: Important ⚠️
slides.content: `useFocusEffect` should be wrapped in `React.useCallback` to avoid running on every render. The cleanup function is optional but important for subscriptions.
